description: Style Note Designed for the sporty soul, this pair of shorts from puma is crafted from soft and absorbent polyester fabric that keeps you dry and ensures exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the Fit with the drawstring. Slip into these shorts when blazing the trail on a healthy run, or on casual day at home, and revel in heavenly comfort.
